abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation module¶

Abaqus batch processing — refactored architecture.

Thin AbaqusCalculation wrapper, ProcessPoolExecutor + JobOutcome for async (fix Q2), plan/prepare split (fix B12), resource planning, JobSpec pipeline.

class abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.AbaqusCalculation(job_name: str, output_dir: str, workflow_strategy, cpus_per_job: int, abaqus_exe: str = 'abaqus', timeout: float | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Thin wrapper: assembles JobContext + AbaqusRunner, delegates to strategy.

No side effects in __init__ (fix B12). Logger is lazy.

execute() → dict[source]¶

使用workflow_strategy跑一个任务(workflow_strategy.execute()), return results dict (status + outputs).

execute() → dict[source]¶
class abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.BatchAbaqusProcessor(batch_data: list[dict] | list[~abaqus_batch_pack.spec.JobSpec], base_output_dir: str, cpus_per_job: int, abaqus_exe: str = 'abaqus', duplicate_mode: str = 'fail', prompt_fn=<built-in function input>, timeout: float | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Orchestrate batch Abaqus jobs. plan/prepare/run_batch split (fix B12).

plan() → dict[str, str][source]¶

Plan job execution: {job_name: ‘run’|’skip’|’overwrite’|new_name}. No directories touched.

prepare(decisions: dict[str, str] | None = None)[source]¶

Apply plan decisions (rmtree, rename) and build AbaqusCalculation list.

run_batch(num_parallel_jobs: int, license_tokens: int | None = None) → list[JobOutcome][source]¶

Execute all calculations. One failure does not affect others (fix Q2-1).

plan() → dict[str, str][source]¶

针对batch_data中的每个JobSpec, 检查base_output_dir下是否存在同名目录

Return {job_name: ‘run’|’skip’|’overwrite’|new_name}. No directories touched.

prepare(decisions: dict[str, str] | None = None)[source]¶

Apply plan decisions (rmtree, rename) and build AbaqusCalculation list.

run_batch(num_parallel_jobs: int, license_tokens: int | None = None) → list[JobOutcome][source]¶

Execute all calculations. One failure does not affect others (fix Q2-1).

class abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.JobOutcome(job_name: str, status: str, results: dict | None = None, error: str | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Unified result envelope. Status is always a string (JSON-serializable).

error: str | None = None¶
job_name: str¶
results: dict | None = None¶
status: str¶
abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.degenerate_from_array(outcomes: list[JobOutcome], output_names: list[str], default_value=nan, require_completed: bool = True) → ndarray[source]¶

Extract a 2D array from outcomes. Natural sort, status-aware (fix B16).

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.generate_from_array(samples_array, param_names, base_spec) → list[JobSpec][source]¶

Generate JobSpecs from a parameter array. Deep-copies base_spec (fix Q3 shallow copy).

Parameters:

  • samples_array – shape (N, D) — numpy array or torch tensor.

  • param_names – list of D strings.

  • base_spec – JobSpec or dict (compat). Each row overrides preparation/monolithic params.

Returns:

N specs with zero-padded names (e.g. job_0001).

Return type:

list[JobSpec]

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.outcomes_to_dict(outcomes: list[JobOutcome]) → dict[str, dict][source]¶

Convert outcomes to {job_name: {…}} format. Raises on duplicate names (fix B14/B15).

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.outcomes_to_list(outcomes: list[JobOutcome]) → list[dict][source]¶

Convert outcomes to old list-of-dicts format.

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.plan_parallelism(requested: int, cpus_per_job: int, license_tokens: int | None = None, reserve_cores: int = 1) → int[source]¶

Compute actual parallelism from CPU and license constraints.

abaqus_batch_pack.abaqus_automation.solver_tokens(n_cpus: int) → int[source]¶

Abaqus license token formula: T(n) = ceil(5 * n^0.422).
